title: Easy Villager Trade Cycling
description: Trade cycling with villagers without the need to break job blocks + ability to charge emeralds and add a cooldown for usage.
body:
# Easy Villager Trade Cycling (EVTC) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_27324897-b337-411e-830a-1618bd7d1912.png) ___This project is filling a gap where there is no easy and customizable villager trade cycling plugin.___ This uses a GUI click in order to make it easy for the player to use, there is also support for permissions and to charge emeralds. Command usage: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_636f904a-c9eb-4d2a-a83d-831de8642a4e.png) *** The default config.yml is shown below:
# VillagerCycleTrading Configuration
 
# Whether players need the villagercycletrading.cycle permission to cycle trades
require-permission: false
 
# Whether to consume emeralds when cycling trades
consume-emerald: true
 
# How many emeralds are consumed per cycle when consume-emerald is true
emerald-cost: 3
 
# Cooldown between trade refreshes (in seconds). Set to 0 to disable.
cooldown-seconds: 5
 
You can pretty much customize everything about this plugin, thats why its great and you should use it.
